bird.name: Dulit frogmouth
bird.summary: The Dulit frogmouth (Batrachostomus harterti) is a little-known species of bird in the frogmouth family, Podargidae, with a patchily record…

relations.subject: Dulit frogmouth
relations.evidence: It has also been seen near Poring in the Kinabalu National Park in Sabah. Its preferred habitat is lower montane forest of both primary and secondary growth, at an elevation of 300 to 1500 m above sea level. At Mount Dulit it replaces the more widespread large frogmouth altitudinally, the latter being found at lower levels
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Dulit frogmouth
relations.evidence: It is restricted to the Bornean Mountains Endemic Bird Area and is threatened by habitat loss through logging and agricultural development
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Dulit frogmouth

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
